approvedApplications.address: Land to the South of 6 Harvest Place Wargrave Reading RG10 8AG
approvedApplications.proposal: Permission in principle application for a residential development comprising the erection of a minimum of 2 and a maximum of 3 dwellings, including removal of existing outbuildings.

pendingApplications.proposal: Permission in principle application for the proposed construction of 2 dwellings on land adjacent to 1 Ilbury Close.

pendingApplications.address: Bridge Farm New Bath Road Twyford Wokingham RG10 9RU
pendingApplications.proposal: Submission of details to comply with Condition 11 (Samples of Materials) of planning consent 212720 dated 05/07/2023 for outline application for the development of up to 200 dwellings, including 40% affordable housing and associated infrastructure, open space, biodiversity enhancements, landscaping and green infrastructure, following demolition of existing agricultural buildings. Condition 11 relates to samples and details of materials to be used in the construction of external surfaces for Phase 1.

pendingApplications.address: Hogwood Farm Sheerlands Road Arborfield Wokingham RG40 4QY
pendingApplications.proposal: Application for submission of details to comply with Conditions 3 (Materials), 8 (Electric Vehicle Charging) and 9 (Water Butts and Composting) of planning permission 251263 dated 28 April 2026 for the application for approval of Reserved Matters pursuant to Outline Planning Consent O/2014/2179 (as varied by 181194 dated 14 November 2018) comprising details of 140 dwellings within Parcel P6 together with associated internal access roads, parking, landscaping, footpaths and sustainable urban drainage systems (SuDS) at Parcel P6, Finchwood Park, Sheerlands Road, Finchampstead, Wokingham, RG40 4QY.

pendingApplications.address: Land located to the east of Watmore Lane/Maidensfield Winnersh RG41
pendingApplications.proposal: Application for submission of details to comply with Condition 14 (noise mitigation, cooling and ventilation details) of planning permission 250640 dated 07/04/2025 relating to outline planning permission 230208 for a residential development of up to 234 dwellings at Land off Watmore Lane/Maidensfield, Winnersh.

pendingApplications.address: Land at Sun Lane Basingstoke Road Heckfield
pendingApplications.proposal: Consultation from Hart District Council for the following proposal: Outline application with all matters reserved except for access for the construction of up to 44 dwellings including affordable housing together with access, landscaping and associated infrastructure (cross boundary application).
